scope: v1 contract consumer readiness handoff receipt uniqueness
summary: v236 verifies the consumer handoff chain has unique receipt IDs and unique evidence paths across bundle, checklist, digest, and readiness handoff layers.
guards: v211 consumer handoff bundle receipt is unique
v215 consumer verification checklist receipt is unique
v220 consumer evidence digest receipt is unique
v225 consumer readiness handoff receipt is unique
consumer chain evidence paths are unique and point to their versioned e/ directories
